g.text: (KPI Query | DQ Rule Discovery | Rule Authoring)
AI / LLM - Databricks Model Serving (DBRX / BYOM)
DQ Backend App - Databricks Apps REST
Unity Catalog Delta - State / Data Layer
These docs are always in the system prompt.
to its Delta table + column + filter pattern.
A) KPI / metric query → deterministic Delta lookup (CAG only)
B) DQ rule discovery → Cache hit first, LLM fallback
C) Save / author rule → Full validation + approval pipeline
INTENT A — KPI / Metric Query (DRRI score, freshness, incident count, schema score)
drri_score -> drri_kpi_metrics, col: drri_pct, filter: domain + schema
freshness_score -> drri_kpi_metrics, col: freshness, filter: table_name
incident_count -> drri_kpi_metrics, col: incident_count, filter: date_range
All lookups are parameterised SQL - no free-text LLM generation.
Render KPI card / table to user
Deterministic path - NO LLM token cost.
CAG map ensures consistent column resolution.
New KPI types added by updating kpi_table_map.json only.
INTENT B — DQ Rule Discovery for a Table / Schema
Resolve cache table + rule store table
Hit = return cached suggestions, skip LLM entirely.
Blocks low-quality retrieval from reaching LLM.
Rule list displayed with source tags
INTENT C — Save / Author a New DQ Rule
Index: UC Volume doc index (BGE-M3 embeddings)
CRAG gates low-quality chunks before they reach LLM.
LOW-confidence fallback uses keyword search on check_type.
+ CRAG SQL patterns) to AI Gateway
system prompt: CAG docs + CRAG SQL patterns)
- CRAG SQL pattern chunks (Vector Search - confidence-gated)
(scan SQL for DML / DDL / DROP / TRUNCATE
Blocks: INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DROP, TRUNCATE,
EXEC, MERGE, CREATE, ALTER, GRANT, REVOKE.
Only SELECT + WITH CTEs are allowed in DQ rules.
If blocked → return error to UI, abort pipeline.
Show existing rule, allow override or cancel
Owner-created rules bypass the workflow queue.
Inserted directly as ACTIVE in anomaly_check_config.
Audit trail maintained in dq_suggested_rules with status=APPROVED.
[Creator is NOT the owner - requires approval]
LOW severity: auto-approved after SLA expiry if no action.
Owner can APPROVE (→ ACTIVE) or REJECT (→ REJECTED).
WRITE final turn + compact at 10 turns
Compacted to summary at 10 turns to control token cost.
All LLM calls pass through AI Gateway for rate-limit + PII filter + cost cap.
All Delta writes are Unity-Catalog-governed (row/col security + lineage).
